title: ServiceAgreementCreateRequest
description: Parameters for ccap/contract/service/create. Creates a formally verified service-level agreement between a capability provider and a consumer. Pricing, latency guarantees, and availability commitments are fixed for the contract term. SLA violations trigger automatic penalties.

provider.description: CCAP agent ID of the capability provider.

consumer.description: CCAP agent ID of the capability consumer.

capability.description: The capability name as registered in the CCAP capability registry. Must match a capability declared by the provider's registration.

price_per_call.description: Price per capability invocation in the specified currency. The Lean 4 invariant guarantees this price is fixed for the entire contract term; unilateral changes by the provider are rejected.

max_latency_ms.description: Maximum acceptable latency per invocation in milliseconds (p99). Exceedances within a measurement window trigger automatic SLA-violation penalties.

min_availability_pct.description: Minimum uptime percentage over any 30-day rolling window, e.g. 99.9 for 99.9%. Falling below this threshold triggers automatic penalties.

escrow_required.description: Whether the consumer must fund a pre-work escrow before the provider processes each invocation batch. Required for high-value or high-risk capabilities.

escrow_batch_size.description: Number of invocations covered by each escrow deposit. Required when escrow_required is true.

bond_required.description: Whether the provider must maintain an active CCAP liability bond for the duration of the contract.

bond_minimum_amount.description: Minimum bond amount the provider must maintain. Required when bond_required is true. The contract activation check verifies the provider has an active bond meeting or exceeding this amount.

dispute_resolution.description: Method for resolving SLA disputes. 'arbitration_agent' uses a pre-designated arbitrator; 'multi_sig' uses a majority vote panel; 'automatic' uses machine-verifiable evidence only.

arbitration_agent_id.description: CCAP agent ID of the designated arbitrator. Required when dispute_resolution is 'arbitration_agent'.

sla_penalty_schedule.description: Penalty structure for SLA violations. If absent, default CCAP penalty schedule applies.

latency_breach_pct_per_incident.description: Percentage of the billing period fee refunded per latency SLA breach.

availability_breach_pct_per_day.description: Percentage of the monthly fee refunded per day of availability breach.

max_credit_pct_per_month.description: Maximum total credit the consumer can receive in any single month, as a percentage of that month's fees.

runtime.description: Execution runtime for penalty enforcement and payment settlement.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for internal tracking.
